name: Multi-Agent AI Collaboration Platform

models.name: AiAgentTeam
models.description: Groups of digital employees assembled for a specific task, with supervisor and member list

models.name: AiAgentConversation
models.description: Multi-agent thread with topic, status, summary, outcome

models.name: AiAgentMessage
models.description: Per-message log: agent-to-agent or broadcast, typed (broadcast/delegation/response/executive_summary)

models.name: AiAgentDecision
models.description: Decisions produced from collaboration, with evidence JSON and proposal link

models.name: AiAgentVote
models.description: Per-agent votes on decisions (yes/no/abstain), unique per decision+agent

models.name: AiSharedWorkspace
models.description: JSONB workspace where agents deposit their analysis findings

models.name: AiSharedMemory
models.description: Cross-agent scoped memory (global/team/task), unique per tenant+scope+key, with TTL

models.name: AiDelegation
models.description: Immutable log of every delegation: from/to agent, type, request, response, duration

models.name: AiMeeting
models.description: AI meeting sessions with agenda, status, summary, decision count

features: 20 default digital employees: CEO, COO, CFO, CTO, HR Director, Sales Director, Marketing Director, Procurement Director, Inventory Manager, Production Director, Finance Manager, Customer Success Manager, Support Manager, Legal Advisor, Compliance Officer, Security Officer, Business Analyst, Data Analyst, Project Manager, Automation Manager
selectAgentsForRequest(): keyword-based agent selection (RegExp per domain)
getAgentSystemPrompt(): per-role system prompt with safety constraints built in

steps: 7. Promise.all() → parallel delegation to all non-CEO agents
Each agent: createDelegation() + callClaudeForChat() or callAI() + completeDelegation() + appendToWorkspace()
8. CEO synthesizes all findings into executive summary
runMultiAgentTask.returns: conversationId, meetingId, teamId, workspaceId, agentsInvolved, delegations, decisions, executiveSummary

endpoints.description: Run full multi-agent task (synchronous — waits for all agents)

pages.description: Dashboard: org chart, collab stats, recent conversations, delegate modal with inline result viewer
Team builder: list teams, create with agent slug composition
Shared workspace explorer: per-agent analysis + CEO executive summary with expand/collapse
AI meeting room: schedule, view participants (chair/member), read summary, see decision count

collaborationExamples.reduceCosts: CEO → CFO (finance) + Procurement Director + HR Director + Business Analyst → CEO produces executive recommendation
collaborationExamples.newBranch: CEO → CFO (investment) + HR (hiring) + Marketing (campaign) + Legal (compliance) + COO (operations) → CEO final plan
collaborationExamples.customerSatisfaction: CEO → Support Manager + CS Manager + Data Analyst + Sales Director → CEO combined report

safetyChecks.agentsCannotBypassTenantIsolation: tenantId on every model, every query scoped
safetyChecks.allAgentCommunicationAudited: AiAgentMessage written for every broadcast, delegation, response, summary
safetyChecks.allDelegationLogged: AiDelegation with request, response, duration, status
safetyChecks.noDestructiveActions: Agents only read and create proposals

futurePreparation.openAISupport: Provider abstraction in executor uses provider param — adding 'openai' requires only a new callAI() adapter
futurePreparation.geminiSupport: Same abstraction — new adapter in provider.js
futurePreparation.mcpServers: Tool executor can be extended to route to MCP server calls
futurePreparation.externalConnectors: Workspace + Delegation log provides the event bus for future enterprise integrations
futurePreparation.digitalWorkforce: Agent team + schedule + delegation = foundation for autonomous digital workforce licensing

architecturalGoal: Reno now behaves like an AI company: 20 specialized digital employees collaborate under CEO (supervisor) orchestration with Reno Brain as governance layer and Claude as optional reasoning engine. Every collaboration is fully auditable, tenant-isolated, and human-approval-gated.
mandatoryRule: STOPPED. Do not start Phase 37 until Phase 36 is reviewed and approved by ChatGPT.
